description.content: Obtain OAuth 2.0 access tokens for API authorization.
Exchange your client credentials for an OAuth 2.0 bearer access token for the Airtime API. Set audience to https://topups.reloadly.com.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Browse mobile network operators and their coverage.
Retrieve a paginated list of supported mobile network operators. Supports filtering by country code. Returns operator details including name, country, supported denominations, and FX rates.

query.description: Filter by ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code

response.name: Paginated list of operators

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Send airtime top-ups to mobile phones worldwide.
Send an airtime top-up to a mobile phone. Specify the operator ID or let the API auto-detect it from the phone number and country. Returns a transaction object with delivery confirmation.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

List and retrieve top-up transaction history.
Retrieve a paginated list of all airtime top-up transactions. Supports filtering by date range, phone number, and status.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Check your Reloadly account balance.
Retrieve the current balance of your Reloadly account for airtime top-ups.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

The Reloadly Airtime API enables businesses to programmatically deliver mobile airtime top-ups and data bundles to phones across 170+ countries and 800+ mobile operators. The API supports both operator-specific and auto-detect top-ups, with real-time fulfillment and detailed transaction reporting. Authentication uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials with separate sandbox and production environments.

Contact Support:
 Name: Reloadly Support
